alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices and Services with two promotions in Strategy and Operations; positioned as Strategy and Operations / Product Operations leader with experience scaling global commercial operations
alignments.job_requirement: Senior Manager, Sales Strategy & Operations role in Strategy & Operations department

alignments.candidate_evidence: Experience in global commercial operations and transformation programs; GTM / Sales Strategy and Operations is listed as a primary target role family
alignments.job_requirement: Sales Strategy & Operations focus with responsibility for commercial operations strategy

alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years managing transformation programs and scaling operations globally; demonstrated ability to work across multiple stakeholder groups and drive cross-functional change
alignments.job_requirement: Program and transformation leadership at multi-stakeholder level

alignments.candidate_evidence: Google Devices and Services background demonstrates experience in large-scale enterprise operations; two promotions indicate progression through increasingly complex strategic responsibility
alignments.job_requirement: Strategic planning and operations execution in a large enterprise environment

alignments.candidate_evidence: Target seniority band is Manager, Senior Manager, Lead, and Principal IC; eight-year tenure with promotions suggests Senior Manager level or equivalent strategic responsibility in strategy and operations
alignments.job_requirement: Senior Manager scope reporting to leadership and owning functional P&L or revenue strategy accountability

alignments.candidate_evidence: No explicit Salesforce product experience mentioned; background is in Google Devices and Services commercial operations, not Salesforce sales tools or ecosystem
alignments.job_requirement: Salesforce ecosystem, product, or platform familiarity (implied by Sales Strategy role at Salesforce)

gaps.gap: No demonstrated experience with Salesforce products, platform, or go-to-market ecosystem
gaps.mitigation: Sales Strategy & Operations strategy and execution fundamentals are transferable; Salesforce domain knowledge is learnable through onboarding, customer research, and collaboration with product and sales teams

gaps.gap: JD explicitly requests Sales Strategy & Operations; candidate background is in Devices and Services commercial operations, which may differ in sales motion, quota structure, and revenue model
gaps.mitigation: Core competencies in strategy, program leadership, and transformation are directly applicable; sales operations domain expertise can be acquired through immersion and mentorship

gaps.gap: Limited clarity on P&L ownership, revenue accountability, or direct quota/revenue impact responsibilities in candidate background
gaps.mitigation: Candidate's transformation program and commercial operations background implies operational and business-impact accountability; deeper discovery needed on breadth of financial responsibility

output.level_rationale: Senior Manager title with multi-function ownership, reporting to strategy/operations leadership, and P&L or revenue strategy accountability typical of L5 IC or manager-of-managers on enterprise GTM teams. Salesforce is a large enterprise; role likely manages strategic programs across sales regions or functions. No specific years required stated; strong manager-of-managers or senior IC scope implies L5-L6 range; title suggests L5 is more probable."
output.summary: Strong fit to Sales Strategy & Operations family and target seniority band (L5). Candidate brings eight years of Google-scale Strategy and Operations experience with demonstrated transformation and commercial-operations leadership. Primary gap is domain expertise in Salesforce sales products and sales operations motions; this is learnable and mitigated by strong foundational strategy, program, and stakeholder-management capabilities. Role clarity and confidence are solid; Salesforce context and JD depth are sufficient for confident assessment.
uncertainties: JD text is truncated and does not include full scope, responsibilities, reporting line, or specific functional areas owned (e.g., forecast, territory, hiring, ops systems)
No explicit years of experience required stated in JD; Senior Manager title suggests 6-10 years in role family, but Salesforce enterprise stage is not detailed
Candidate background does not specify quota ownership, revenue P&L accountability, or direct sales ops system expertise (forecasting, CRM config, territory management)

Sales operations scope at a cloud enterprise (Salesforce) may involve deeper systems, process, or analytics work than Devices and Services commercial operations; level of technical tools depth unclear
